name: Repeat Non-Windows Login Failures
notes: Reports when a source IP address causes an authentication failure event at least 7 times to a single destination within 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 7 times with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 7 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 7 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Repeat Non-Windows Login Failures on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures match at least 7 times with the same Source IP, Destination IP, Event Name in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Authentication: Repeated Non-Windows Login Failures
Event description: Detected a source IP address causing an authentication failure event at least 7 times to a single destination within 5 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
